overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a steady trek across a vast snow-covered glacier toward massive ice-capped mountain peaks. The scene features pristine white snow under a deep blue sky with prominent controller button prompts visible at the bottom of the screen, indicating PlayStation gameplay.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine glacier field with ice-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through deep snow toward the glacier peaks, with slight adjustments in heading

entered.detail: dominant snow-covered mountain with visible ice faces and rock outcroppings
sloping ridgeline covered in snow extending to the horizon
expansive white snow-covered terrain with subtle surface texture and footprints

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward across a vast snow-covered glacier under a clear blue sky. The main glacier peak dominates the center horizon while the left mountain range frames the scene. The terrain is pristine white snow with no vegetation or other characters present, creating an isolated alpine atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a desolate, frozen expanse toward a towering alpine horizon. It begins with a steady trek over a vast snow-covered glacier, where the pristine white terrain stretches out under a deep blue sky. As the camera advances, the main glacier peak grows more dominant in the center of the frame, while a rugged mountain range begins to frame the left side of the view. The scene maintains a sense of profound isolation, moving deeper into the alpine wilderness as the scale of the surrounding peaks expands to fill the horizon.
